'''ây-p-r''' ('''kayapar''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|active verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:echelon|echelon]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| y-p-r
|-
! Word class
| [[Active verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:echelon|echelon]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| ây-p-r
|-
! Lemma
| kayapar
|}

== [[Agent]] agreement paradigm ==
''Base present, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thiyapar|thiyapar]] || [[word:jiyapar|jiyapar]] || [[word:shiyapar|shiyapar]] || [[word:kiyapar|kiyapar]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:thuthuyapar|thuthuyapar]] || [[word:jujuyapar|jujuyapar]] || [[word:shushuyapar|shushuyapar]] || [[word:kukuyapar|kukuyapar]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:thuyapar|thuyapar]] || [[word:juyapar|juyapar]] || [[word:shuyapar|shuyapar]] || [[word:kuyapar|kuyapar]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:thuyapar|thuyapar]] || [[word:juyapar|juyapar]] || [[word:shuyapar|shuyapar]] || [[word:kuyapar|kuyapar]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:theyapar|theyapar]] || [[word:jeyapar|jeyapar]] || [[word:sheyapar|sheyapar]] || [[word:keyapar|keyapar]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:thothoyapar|thothoyapar]] || [[word:jojoyapar|jojoyapar]] || [[word:shoshoyapar|shoshoyapar]] || [[word:kokoyapar|kokoyapar]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:thoyapar|thoyapar]] || [[word:joyapar|joyapar]] || [[word:shoyapar|shoyapar]] || [[word:koyapar|koyapar]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:thoyapar|thoyapar]] || [[word:joyapar|joyapar]] || [[word:shoyapar|shoyapar]] || [[word:koyapar|koyapar]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:thĂŠyapar|thĂŠyapar]] || [[word:jĂŠyapar|jĂŠyapar]] || [[word:shĂŠyapar|shĂŠyapar]] || [[word:kĂŠyapar|kĂŠyapar]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:thathayapar|thathayapar]] || [[word:jajayapar|jajayapar]] || [[word:shashayapar|shashayapar]] || [[word:kakayapar|kakayapar]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:thayapar|thayapar]] || [[word:jayapar|jayapar]] || [[word:shayapar|shayapar]] || [[word:kayapar|kayapar]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:thayapar|thayapar]] || [[word:jayapar|jayapar]] || [[word:shayapar|shayapar]] || [[word:kayapar|kayapar]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[active]].none || [[word:shayapar|shayapar]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].none || [[word:goshayapar|goshayapar]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].none || [[word:gokishayapar|gokishayapar]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]] || [[word:shayaparnĂŒ|shayaparnĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]] || [[word:goshayaparnknĂŒ|goshayaparnknĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]] || [[word:gokishayaparnĂŒ|gokishayaparnĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:shayaparshĂ«|shayaparshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:goshayaparnkshĂ«|goshayaparnkshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokishayaparshĂ«|gokishayaparshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:shayaparo|shayaparo]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshayaparnkro|goshayaparnkro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishayaparo|gokishayaparo]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]] || [[word:shayaparmu|shayaparmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:goshayaparnkmu|goshayaparnkmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishayaparmu|gokishayaparmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[mythical]] || [[word:shayaparsher|shayaparsher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:goshayaparnksher|goshayaparnksher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:gokishayaparsher|gokishayaparsher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[intention]] || [[word:shayaparng|shayaparng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[intention]] || [[word:goshayaparnkng|goshayaparnkng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[intention]] || [[word:gokishayaparng|gokishayaparng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[optative]] || [[word:shayaparya|shayaparya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[optative]] || [[word:goshayaparnkya|goshayaparnkya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[optative]] || [[word:gokishayaparya|gokishayaparya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:shayaparyam|shayaparyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:goshayaparnkyam|goshayaparnkyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:gokishayaparyam|gokishayaparyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:shayaparnĂŒshĂ«|shayaparnĂŒshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshayaparnknĂŒshĂ«|goshayaparnknĂŒshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishayaparnĂŒshĂ«|gokishayaparnĂŒshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shayaparnĂŒro|shayaparnĂŒro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshayaparnknĂŒro|goshayaparnknĂŒro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishayaparnĂŒro|gokishayaparnĂŒro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shayaparnĂŒmu|shayaparnĂŒmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshayaparnknĂŒmu|goshayaparnknĂŒmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishayaparnĂŒmu|gokishayaparnĂŒmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:shayaparshĂ«nĂŒ|shayaparshĂ«nĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshayaparnkshĂ«nĂŒ|goshayaparnkshĂ«nĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishayaparshĂ«nĂŒ|gokishayaparshĂ«nĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shayaparshĂ«ro|shayaparshĂ«ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshayaparnkshĂ«ro|goshayaparnkshĂ«ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishayaparshĂ«ro|gokishayaparshĂ«ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shayaparshĂ«mu|shayaparshĂ«mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshayaparnkshĂ«mu|goshayaparnkshĂ«mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishayaparshĂ«mu|gokishayaparshĂ«mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:shayaparonĂŒ|shayaparonĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshayaparnkronĂŒ|goshayaparnkronĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishayaparonĂŒ|gokishayaparonĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:shayaparoshĂ«|shayaparoshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshayaparnkroshĂ«|goshayaparnkroshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishayaparoshĂ«|gokishayaparoshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shayaparomu|shayaparomu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshayaparnkromu|goshayaparnkromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishayaparomu|gokishayaparomu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:shayaparmunĂŒ|shayaparmunĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshayaparnkmunĂŒ|goshayaparnkmunĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishayaparmunĂŒ|gokishayaparmunĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:shayaparmushĂ«|shayaparmushĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshayaparnkmushĂ«|goshayaparnkmushĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishayaparmushĂ«|gokishayaparmushĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shayaparmuro|shayaparmuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshayaparnkmuro|goshayaparnkmuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishayaparmuro|gokishayaparmuro]]
|}

''63 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

{{wordpage|88d00a5}}
